title: First Principles Backend Roadmap
subtitle: Three Node.js backends that repeat the same 21 concepts until they stick.

projects.title: Personal Finance Tracker API
projects.purpose: The foundation project with simple CRUD and very clear request flow.

projects.title: Real-time Ride-Sharing Matching Service
projects.purpose: The scale project with state handling, concurrency, and faster decisions.

projects.title: Multi-tenant SaaS Subscription Engine
projects.purpose: The professional project with tenancy, billing logic, and production controls.

checklist: Roadmap and planning with an architecture diagram first.
HTTP fundamentals using the native http module before Express.
Custom routing for request path and method handling.
Serialization and deserialization beyond plain JSON when useful.
Authentication with JWT and refresh tokens.
Authorization with role-based access control.
Validation with Zod or Joi for incoming payloads.
Transformation from request data to domain models.
Custom middleware for logging, auth, and rate limiting.
Request context using request-id and AsyncLocalStorage.
Controller and handler separation from business logic.
Service layer for core business rules.
CRUD with transactions and locking where needed.
REST best practices with clear resource naming and idempotency.
Repository pattern for database access.
Global error handling for operational and programmer errors.
Retry and circuit-breaker thinking for faults.
Config management with required env validation.
Graceful shutdown for SIGTERM and in-flight requests.
Structured logging and basic metrics.
Security with Helmet, CORS, and sanitization.
